phase.automation-note: bash tools/cycle-runner close-out --issue {N} Auto-posts steps C4.1, C5, C5.1, C5.5, C5.6, C6, C7, C8. You handle: C1, C2, C3, C4.5 manually before running cycle-runner close-out. Prerequisites: Run cycle-complete, write-entry (worklog + journal), post C4.5. The tool is idempotent. If gate fails, fix and re-run.

step.title: Pipeline verification (early)
step.description: Early check before state modifications. Not the final gate.

at-cycle-end.constraint: Run cycle-complete BEFORE dispatching review agent.

step.title: Validate documentation (BLOCKING GATE)
step.on-failure: Fix the issue. Re-run validation. Do NOT proceed to C5.

step.title: ADR check and doc-validation override
step.description: Check if decisions this cycle warrant ADRs. Post before cycle-runner close-out.

adr-worthy.criterion: New architectural patterns or significant refactors

step.constraint: Must be posted before C5.5 gate runs.

step.title: Commit and push docs + state
step.constraint: Worklog, journal, and state.json MUST be committed and pushed BEFORE review dispatch (C6). The review agent reads the repo at dispatch time. Uncommitted docs = false positive "missing" findings.

sequence.action: Commit all worklog and journal entries.

scope-exclusions.reason: Structurally created after worklog is written

step.title: Final pipeline gate (BLOCKING GATE)
step.constraint: All 5 phases MUST pass before review dispatch.
step.on-failure: Fix before closing cycle. Do not override.
step.coordination-rule: When deploying format-changing tools: merge downstream consumer update BEFORE applying new tool output.

when.action: Increment clean_cycle_counter. Append cycle to consecutive_clean_cycles.
Reset clean_cycle_counter to 0. Clear array. Log reason in journal.

substep.title: Copilot availability gate
substep.action: Skip dispatch. Post step comment noting deferral.

review-spec.adversarial-mandate: Your job is to find everything wrong with this cycle's work. Be thorough. Be skeptical. If something looks fine on the surface, dig deeper.

review-targets.target: Merged PRs, direct pushes. Quality, tests, conventions.
Cross-reference claims against commits, state.json, issue activity.
Genuine reflection or boilerplate? Observable commitments?
Metrics current? Freshness accurate? Run spot-checks.
Verify hashes. Receipt scope: through cycle-complete. Docs commit and record-dispatch commit STRUCTURALLY EXCLUDED -- do NOT flag their absence.
AGENTS.md, skills, checklists consistent with practice?
Followed checklists? Used tools? Check temporal ordering of step comments (created_at timestamps).
Going through motions? Findings noted but not fixed? Deferrals accumulating?

output-format.template:
## N. [category-name] Finding title
**File**: path/to/file:line **Evidence**: what was observed **Recommendation**: concrete action
output-format.rule: Category tag MUST appear in heading inside square brackets.
output-format.scoring-cap: If cycle overrode any FAIL/blocking pipeline gate, max score = 3/5.
output-format.depth-preference: Three deeply investigated findings with evidence beat ten surface observations.

review-spec.stabilization-overlay: OBSERVATION MODE (ADR 0011): Log all findings in standard format. Do NOT classify any as requiring immediate action. All findings logged for post-stabilization triage. Your role is forensic documentation.

dispatch-mechanics.constraint: Copilot agents CANNOT post issue comments. They create PRs.
dispatch-mechanics.instruction: Agent must commit findings as docs/reviews/cycle-NNN.md.

content-requirements.item: Current cycle number and issue link
List of PRs merged this cycle
Paths to worklog and journal entries

step.title: Fallback self-review
step.condition: C6 dispatch failed AND previous also failed

checklist.item: Receipt verification: run cycle-receipts, verify all.
Step comment audit: verify all mandatory steps posted.
State.json integrity: run pipeline-check, confirm invariants.
Worklog accuracy: cross-reference claims against git history.

required-sections.section: Header: Self-review -- independent review agent unavailable
Summary: N findings (A actioned, D deferred, I ignored)

step.escalation: File question-for-eva after 2 consecutive dispatch failures.

step.title: Commit dispatch state and push
step.action: record-dispatch already committed state change. Push immediately.
step.constraint: This receipt appears in closing comment but NOT in worklog receipt table.
